Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 307 

SNP_INSTITUTIONAL_TYPE 

LABEL: Special Needs Plan (SNP) Institutional Type 

DESCRIPTION: This variable describes the special needs plan (SNP) institutional type for applicable plan benefit 
packages. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 1 = Institutional Only 
2 = Institutional Equivalent 
3 = Institutional and Institutional Equivalent 
9 =
